hero.badge: No Scams, Just Facts · Updated for 2026
hero.desc: Everything a foreigner needs to land in South Korea in 2026 — Incheon Airport entry, K-ETA, transport options, and zero scam traps.

airport.desc: Live KST-based status. ICN operates 24/7 — GMP & PUS have night curfews.

ICN.name: Incheon International Airport
ICN.fact2026: T2 Phase 4 expansion complete — capacity now 100M passengers/year.

transport.name: AREX Express
transport.tip: Reserved seating · Free Wi-Fi · Direct to Seoul Station

transport.name: Airport Limousine Bus
transport.tip: Best if you have heavy luggage — stops in front of major hotels

transport.name: Climate Card Tourist Pass
transport.tip: New 2026 short-term tourist pass — covers all Seoul Metro + bus

GMP.name: Gimpo International Airport
GMP.curfewWarning: Flights landing after 23:00 may be diverted to Incheon. Confirm your arrival time.

transport.name: Seoul Metro Line 5 / 9
transport.tip: Line 9 Express to Yeouido in 18 min

transport.name: Kakao T Taxi
transport.tip: Download Kakao T app before arrival

PUS.name: Gimhae International Airport
PUS.curfewWarning: Night curfew strictly enforced. Late arrivals will be turned away.

transport.name: Busan-Gimhae Light Rail (BGL)
transport.tip: Connect to Sasang Station for KTX to Seoul

docs.desc: 3 essential documents to prepare before flying to South Korea.
docs.scamTitle: ⚠️ Warning: Don't pay more than $10 for K-ETA
docs.scamDesc: The official K-ETA fee is ₩10,000 (~$7.50 USD). Scam sites charge $50–$100. Always confirm the URL is k-eta.go.kr (.go.kr = Korean government).
docs.exemptDesc: Citizens of 67 countries including the US, UK, and Australia are temporarily exempt from K-ETA until December 31, 2026.

k-eta.name: K-ETA (Korea Electronic Travel Authorization)
k-eta.scamWarning: Don't pay more than $10 for K-ETA. Fake sites charge $50–$100. Only use k-eta.go.kr.
k-eta.exemptionNote: 67 countries incl. US, UK & Australia exempt until Dec 31, 2026. Check eligibility first.
steps: Create an account with your email

q-code.name: Q-Code (Quarantine Pre-Registration)
q-code.scamWarning: Q-Code is 100% FREE. Any site asking for payment is a scam. Register at qcode.kdca.go.kr.
q-code.exemptionNote: Q-Code is 2× faster than paper forms at the customs counter.
steps: Save the QR code to your phone

e-arrival.name: e-Arrival Card
e-arrival.scamWarning: e-Arrival Card is completely FREE. Submit within 72 hours before your flight.

items: Apply K-ETA on official k-eta.go.kr (₩10,000 only)
Check airport curfew times for GMP / PUS
Download Kakao T app for taxis
Get a T-Money card for transit (₩3,000 deposit)
Exchange KRW or set up Wise / Revolut card

footer.name: Wtoko — Welcome TO KOrea
footer.desc: Facts verified for 2026. Always check official government sources before travel.
